frameworkDetail: Flutter app (stable channel, .metadata revision ad70ec4617166f1c38e5d2bfd388af71fda14f06) targeting Dart SDK ^3.12.2, with go_router ^17.3.0 for navigation
dataLayerPattern: Offline-first repository facade. A single composition root (lib/data/app_services.dart, AppServices) wires a drift database, an AppRepository, and auxiliary services, then exposes them to screens through top-level getters (repo, sync, voiceQueue, billing, session, appPrefs, appTheme). Screens NEVER touch drift directly (except receipt_screen's one-row payment fetch); they call AppRepository methods that return drift Streams (watchDashboard/watchDebts/watchDebt/watchDebtReminders/watchCustomers/watchCustomerActivity/watchReminders/watchNotifications/watchRecentPayments) consumed via StreamBuilder, and Futures for mutations (recordDebt/recordPayment/sendReminder/addCustomer/saveBusiness...). Every mutation writes locally and instantly and marks rows syncState=pending; SyncService (stub) later flips them to synced. Auth/session is a DELIBERATELY separate seam (SessionStore over shared_preferences) that performs no DB writes. Billing is its own seam (BillingService over in_app_purchase, backend-entitlement reflecting). Debtor pay-links are a third seam (PaystackLinkService, stubbed). Voice-to-debt is a fourth seam (VoiceNoteQueue + VoiceParser + SpeechCapture). Seed data (lib/data/seed.dart) populates the exact design-canvas numbers on first launch. Backend endpoints are marked throughout as stubbed seams (paystack_links, billing_service._verifyWithBackend, sync_service, payout resolve, voice AI-parse override).

localPersistence.offlineFirstSignals: OFFLINE-FIRST SIGNALS ARE STRONGLY PRESENT. drift (SQLite) is the primary local store: 7 tables (Customers, Debts, Payments, Reminders, VoiceNotes, BusinessProfiles, AppNotifications) each carry a SyncState enum column (pending/synced); AppRepository docstring says 'Every mutation completes locally and instantly (offline-first); rows are marked pending for the sync layer.' A stub SyncService (lib/data/sync/sync_service.dart) reconciles pending rows, exposes an online toggle + watchPendingCount, and has NO backend yet. VoiceNotes has a ParseState (pending/parsed/failed) offline-capture queue. shared_preferences is a secondary store for auth-session flag, theme, language, and payout-account fields. SYNC STRATEGY IS REQUIRED and was already decided in Phase 0 — this is a flag for the backend build, not an open question.

keepLocalExcluded.reason: User ruling 2026-07-11: pure static content / device-local prefs (marketing copy, FAQ, version/legal, language, theme) and the dev-only gallery. Not served by the backend; excluded from Phase 2 extraction and Phase 3 contracts.

servePersisted.reason: User ruling 2026-07-11: notification preferences persist server-side so backend push (declared owner-only surface) honors them. Extract as a real resource despite having no persistence as-built.

rulings.staffModel: User ruling 2026-07-11: coarse owner|staff only (supersede S-4). Extract staff/staff-permissions to capture the Staff resource shape; reconciliation applies S-4 to collapse the granular permission matrix.

screens.title: Splash
screens.notes: Reads session.loggedIn (SessionStore seam) to branch to /dashboard vs /welcome; no data lists.

inlineLiterals.description: Marketing pitch headline + subtitle copy, lines ~26-42 — onboarding copy that should stay local

Onboarding copy varying on signup flag, lines ~48-97 (static). AUTH ACTION: collects phone digits and (as-built) passes to /otp with a mock >=11-digit gate; the real backend action this screen fires is request-OTP-for-phone (POST /auth/request-otp, always 202). Extract that action; the static copy stays local.
Fallback phone default '08032218890' when route extra is null, line ~76 (placeholder). Uses session.logIn() seam at line ~69.

STATIC reference lists: _categories lines ~12-20, _currencies lines ~29-34. INLINE mock/demo: _tones sample messages lines ~36-49 (referencing 'Mama Grace'/'₦85,000'), prefilled business name 'Excel Provisions' line ~63, default category/tone lines ~64-68. Writes profile via repo.saveBusiness + session.logIn.

screens.title: Dashboard
screens.notes: repo.watchDashboard() (DashboardData: outstanding/recovered/dueToday/overdue/activity), repo.watchBusiness(), repo.watchHasUnread(). _InsightSlot is an unpowered AI stub.

screens.title: Customers List
screens.notes: repo.watchCustomers() -> List<CustomerView>; filter/sort/search client-side. Filter/Sort tuples are UI labels.

screens.title: Customer Detail
screens.notes: repo.watchCustomers/watchDebts/watchCustomerActivity(id), write repo.deleteCustomer. months[] array is date-format helper; _RiskChipSlot is an AI stub.

screens.title: Add Customer
screens.notes: Write-only form: repo.addCustomer(); device-contact import via pickDeviceContact (lib/data/contacts.dart, flutter_contacts).

inlineLiterals.description: AUTOMATIC-REMINDER SCHEDULE CARD (_AutoReminderCard) does NOT read reminder data: the four schedule rows are a hardcoded 'steps' literal at lines ~661-666 (fixed -3/0/+3/+7-day offsets off view.debt.dueDate at 9am); sent-vs-pending inferred by comparing computed dates to DateTime.now(). repo.watchDebtReminders(id) IS used but only feeds the _DebtTimeline activity list (~lines 819-855), not the schedule card. Rest of screen (repo.watchDebt/watchPayments/watchBusiness + recordPayment/undoLastPayment/restoreDebt/updateDebt/deleteDebt writes) is repository.

INLINE payment-method catalog: top-level const _methods (Cash / Bank transfer / POS / Paystack link) at lines ~14-19, default _method='Cash' ~37. Debt/amount/remaining come from repo.watchDebt + write repo.recordPayment.

INLINE demo utterance: const demo = 'Mama Grace, two bags of rice, 85k, pay Friday' at line ~182, replayed only when no real speech engine (web/preview). Voice flow otherwise correctly uses the seam: SpeechCapture.instance + VoiceParser.parse/parseUtterance, and voice saves persist via voiceQueue.captureToDebt(...) (~283-289) while typed path uses repo.recordDebt (~291). Credits gate via voiceCreditsAvailable ValueNotifier.

screens.title: Receipt
screens.notes: repo.watchAllDebts/watchPayments/watchBusiness plus one DIRECT drift query for the single payment row (AppServices.instance.db, lines ~35-37) — still a data-layer read. businessName falls back to literal 'OweMe' only when absent; share/print are stub snackbars.

screens.title: Reminders
screens.notes: repo.watchReminders() (Scheduled/Sent/Failed tabs), repo.retryReminder(); tab tuples are UI labels.

screens.title: Send Reminder
screens.notes: repo.watchDebt/watchBusiness + repo.sendReminder(); message text composed at runtime from debt+business (templated, not a hardcoded dataset). Pay-link embedded via PaystackLinkService seam.

screens.title: Notifications
screens.notes: repo.watchNotifications() + markAllNotificationsRead(); _style icon map is presentation.

inlineLiterals.description: INLINE seeded recent-search history: static final _recents = ['Mama Grace','₦85,000','0803 456 7890','Emeka Stores'] at lines ~24-29 (mutated at runtime). Live results come from repo.watchCustomers + repo.watchDebts, filtered client-side.

INLINE: '1 staff' hardcoded count on Staff row line ~126; mock payment methods 'Verve •••• 8021' / 'Paystack pay-links' in _openPaymentMethods sheet lines ~255-282; app version 'OweMe 1.4.2' line ~235. Repository parts: repo.watchBusiness, sync.lastSyncedAt, appTheme.mode, appPrefs('payout.bankName'/'app.language'), session.logOut, billing planDisplayName/canonicalPlanId.

STATIC category list: const _categories (Provision store/Pharmacy/Building materials/Fashion & fabric/POS agent) lines ~13-19. _logoUploaded=true is a hardcoded mock (no real upload). repo.watchBusiness prefills, repo.saveBusiness persists.

STATIC/INLINE template content: const _tones (Gentle/Friendly/Firm sample messages w/ 'Mama Grace'/'₦85,000') lines ~13-26; _previewPrefix ~195-199, _previewSuffix ~201-209; sample amount '₦85,000' line ~159; {name}/{amount}/{due} token template lines ~110-127. Repo parts: repo.watchBusiness (current tone/name) + repo.saveBusiness(reminderTone).

STATIC bank list: const kBanks (19 Nigerian banks w/ NUBAN codes) lines ~23-43, explicitly 'Mock of GET /banks until the backend proxies Paystack's list'. NUBAN 10-digit entry + name-resolve is a MOCK (700ms delay, uppercases business.ownerName) at _maybeResolve ~69-92 mirroring POST /payout-account/resolve. Save persists to shared_preferences (payout.bankCode/bankName/accountNumber/accountName) ~154-161, not the repo — a backend seam. Reads repo.getBusiness() for the resolved name.

SubscriptionScreen. Real seams: repo.watchBusiness (plan), billing.entitlement/activePlanId, kPlans from billing.dart, and _BvumCard computes BVUM LIVE from repo.watchAllDebts via computeBvum(). MOCK/INLINE: usage summary reads mocked prefs meters via _usedOf() ~661-662 (defaults 30% of cap or 62); hardcoded renewal text 'renews 1 Aug' ~124; grown-business nudge banner copy ~167.

ComparePlansScreen. INLINE: static const _tiers — four tier cards (name/price/who/flags/feature-list) at lines ~422-480, duplicating the canonical plan data in lib/data/billing/billing.dart (kPlans). repo.watchBusiness only supplies the current-plan highlight.

UsageScreen. INLINE/MOCK: both meter usage values come from _usedOf() over shared_preferences ('usage.sends'/'usage.credits') with hardcoded fallbacks ~661-662 — NOT from any real send/credit ledger. Plan caps (sendsPerMonth/aiCreditsPerMonth) and bundle CTAs come from billing.dart (limitsFor, kMessagingBundles, kAiCreditBundles), and repo.watchBusiness supplies the plan; bundle purchase via billing.buyConsumable. Starter upsell copy ~737-739 hardcoded.
BillingHistoryScreen. INLINE: static const _rows — five hardcoded billing rows (label/date/naira) at lines ~960-966. No data-layer read; receipt buttons are stub snackbars.

UpgradeScreen/_UpgradeSuccess. INLINE: hardcoded Business feature bullet lists ~1180-1185 and ~1324-1328, renewal date strings 'renews 6 Aug' ~1310. Real seam: plan from kPlans, purchase via billing.buyPlan + backend entitlement, repo.saveBusiness mirrors the new plan locally.

StaffScreen. INLINE in-memory roster: top-level kStaff ValueNotifier seeded with 2 mock staff (Excel Okafor owner, Chiamaka Udo cashier) lines ~30-42, invite mutates it in memory ~229-236; const _roles (4 roles) ~52-57. There is NO drift table for staff. Repository parts only for seat-cap text: repo.watchBusiness/getBusiness + billing seatCapForPlan/planDisplayName.

StaffPermissionsScreen. INLINE: reads member from in-memory kStaff ~406-407 and perms from kStaffPerms ~410-413; static const _defaults permission map (Record debts/Record payments/Send reminders/View reports/Manage customers) ~398-404. Deactivate mutates kStaff in memory ~513-516. No repository/db at all.

NotificationSettingsScreen. INLINE local-only toggle state with hardcoded defaults (_payments/_overdue/_delivery=true, _weekly=false) lines ~23-26; four ToggleRow labels ~40-64. Nothing read from or written to any seam — no persistence.

screens.title: Backup & Sync
screens.notes: BackupScreen. Full SyncService seam: sync.online/syncing/lastSyncedAt/watchPendingCount()/setOnline/syncNow. Only 'yesterday, 6:10pm' fallback string ~144 is a display default.

inlineLiterals.description: LanguageScreen. STATIC option list [('English','Default'),('Nigerian Pidgin','Naija')] lines ~318-321; persisted to shared_preferences 'app.language' ~298/325.

AppearanceScreen. STATIC theme options [(system,'System','Match device setting'),(light,'Light','Warm cream'),(dark,'Dark','Warm charcoal')] lines ~265-269; reads/writes appTheme.mode/set (theme controller over prefs — local-only, no backend).
HelpScreen. STATIC: static const _faqs — 5 hardcoded Q&A entries lines ~407-436, filtered locally. 'Talk to us' tiles are snackbars. Should stay local.
AboutScreen. STATIC app info: 'OweMe' name ~628, 'Version 1.4.2 (218)' ~636, 'MADE BY MOXN AFRICA' ~646, Terms/Privacy rows (snackbar-only), tagline — lines ~627-683. No data seams.

DEV-ONLY 'living spec sheet' rendering every shared widget with hardcoded sample values (e.g. _amountDigits='45000'). NOT a product screen — exclude from backend contract extraction. Flagged for human ruling.
